global.title: Subaru’s new top-selling EV delivers over 300 miles of range for just $35,000
global.summary: The Uncharted is now Subaru’s most popular and most affordable EV in the US. Subaru announced that prices for the 2027 Uncharted EV will start at $35,000.

global.title: Range Rover’s first EV will beat its gas counterpart, but it may cost over $150,000
global.summary: The “best” Range Rover has an electric powertrain, according to JLR’s chief growth officer, Lennard Hoornik. Although it may outperform its gas-powered counterpart, the Range Rover EV won’t be cheap, with prices that could top $150,000.

global.title: McMurtry teases its record-shattering electric ‘fan car’ ahead of production
global.summary: McMurtry Automotive, a British company that built a bonkers electric car prototype which has shattered track records everywhere it goes, teased the production version of its Spéirling ‘fan car’, to be unveiled next week.

global.title: Prime Day-3 Deals: ECOVACS LiDAR Pro robot mowers back at lows, Jackery Prime Day power station sale + new releases, more
global.summary: We’re halfway through this week’s Prime Day Sale event, with two more days left to jump on all the very best Green Deals we’ve collected – which can all be found within our regularly updated Prime Day Green Deals roundup hub here. Some of our notable headliners getting the spotlight today are ECOVAC

global.title: Polestar barred from US over the Chinese connected vehicle rule, a dangerous precedent
global.summary: Polestar is pulling new vehicles out of the US market starting with model year 2027 after the Commerce Department declined to grant it authorization under the Connected Vehicle Rule, the company confirmed today. The decision effectively ends new-car sales in the US for the Geely-owned Swedish EV bra

global.title: Toyota is recalling over 20,000 EVs, including Lexus and Subaru models
global.summary: Toyota issued a recall affecting nearly 21,000 electric vehicles, including Lexus and Subaru models.

global.title: The Lexus ES EV barely beat its range estimate in the real world, but falls short of rivals
global.summary: The all-electric Lexus ES 350e traveled slightly further in the real world than its EPA-estimated 292 miles, but it still trails key rivals.

global.title: Europe and North Africa are getting their first undersea power link
global.summary: Italy and Tunisia have taken a major step toward building the first DC power link between Europe and North Africa.

global.title: CATL chief: solid-state batteries at ‘level 4 of 9,’ no leap until 2030
global.summary: Robin Zeng Yuqun, the founder and chairman of CATL, the world’s largest EV battery maker, just poured cold water on the solid-state battery hype, saying the much-anticipated technology is only at “level four” of a nine-step readiness scale. Speaking at “Summer Davos” in China this week, Zeng predict

global.title: Avinox shows off wild new gearbox motor concept as it expands across the e-bike industry
global.summary: Avinox may still be one of the newest names in the e-bike drive system industry, but the company isn’t wasting any time pushing the envelope.
